jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Babyoye - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Babyoye:
Babyoye is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye!
